pages.text:
NorthStar Financial Services
Audit Readiness Checklist
Version 1.0
Document Title: NorthStar Financial Services Audit Readiness Checklist
Document ID: NSFS-CHK-006
Version: 1.0
Owner: Controls Assurance Team
Effective Date: January 1, 2026
Review Frequency: Semi-Annual
Approved By: Senior Manager, Controls Assurance
1. Purpose
This checklist provides the minimum requirements for preparing documentation and supporting
materials in advance of internal audit, control testing, or regulatory review.
2. Scope
This checklist applies to all operational teams responsible for producing evidence related to control
execution, case review, approvals, escalation logs, and remediation activities.
3. Pre-Audit Preparation Requirements
Prior to submission, teams must confirm:
• All requested evidence is complete
• Files are final and version controlled
• Naming conventions are followed
• Date ranges align with the request
• Approvals are visible where required
• Sampling populations reconcile to reported counts
• Supporting procedures are current
4. Required Evidence Categories
Teams may be required to provide:
• SOPs and policy documents
• Case samples
1

• Approval records
• Escalation records
• Control execution logs
• SLA reporting
• QA sampling results
• Remediation records
5. Submission Checklist
Before evidence is submitted, verify:
• Files are in approved format
• File names are descriptive and standardized
• No duplicate or conflicting versions are included
• Sensitive data is handled according to policy
• All required pages or tabs are present
• Summary narrative is included when requested
6. Common Rejection Reasons
Evidence packages may be rejected if:
• File names are unclear
• Dates do not align to the audit period
• Required approvals are missing
• Screenshots are not legible
• Source data does not reconcile
• Supporting context is insufficient
7. Timeline Standards
Unless otherwise stated in the audit request:
• Initial evidence package should be prepared within 5 business days
• Follow-up requests should be addressed within 2 business days
• Material gaps must be escalated on the same business day they are identified
2

8. Ownership
8.1 Analysts
Prepare and organize requested files.
8.2 Managers
Review package quality and completeness.
8.3 Control Owners
Confirm evidence reflects actual process execution.
9. Related Documents
• NSFS Evidence Submission Guide
• NSFS Data Retention Policy
• NSFS Monthly Controls Review Procedure
• NSFS Approval Matrix
3
